name: Beta-Alanine
summary: Buffers muscle acidity, modestly improving performance in sustained high-rep/endurance efforts (~1-4 min). An indirect, situational aid — not a direct muscle-builder.
effect: Small improvement in muscular endurance for efforts lasting roughly 1-4 minutes (e.g. very high-rep sets); minimal relevance to typical hypertrophy rep ranges.
dosing: ~3.2-6.4 g/day, split into smaller doses to limit tingling (paresthesia); benefits come from chronic loading over weeks.
timing: Irrelevant acutely — chronic daily intake is what matters.
safety: Safe; harmless skin tingling (paresthesia) is common at larger single doses.
